meta_description: Learn how to marketing automation and overcome no SaaS knowledge. A Intermediate-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Students: Marketing Automation for SaaS (Checklist)
content.seo_description: Bridge the gap between no SaaS knowledge and professional automation. An intermediate guide using Antigravity and Claude Code for AI-driven growth.
content.answer_block: To overcome a lack of SaaS knowledge, build a marketing automation engine using Antigravity for infrastructure and Claude Code for rapid iteration. By automating lead capture and personalized email sequences, you move from theory to a functional, revenue-generating asset that serves as the cornerstone of your professional portfolio.
content.intro:
The blank screen of a code editor is daunting when you lack a foundational SaaS architecture. You have the ambition to build, but the gap between 'knowing how to code' and 'shipping a production-grade marketing machine' feels like a chasm. It is time to stop theorizing and start engineering.

We are going to deploy an automated marketing funnel that does the heavy lifting for you. Using Antigravity to scaffold your backend and Claude Code to accelerate your logic, you will transform from a student into a builder. This is your blueprint for turning complex automation into a repeatable, high-value asset.

steps.title: Architecting the Lead Capture Flow
steps.description: Define your data schema to store lead interactions. We focus on simplicity: name, email, and interest level.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a robust PostgreSQL schema for a marketing automation tool that includes tables for users, leads, and email_campaigns with proper indexing.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'generate database migration scripts for user and lead tables'

steps.title: Integrating Email Orchestration
steps.description: Connect your backend to an SMTP service to trigger automated welcome sequences.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Build a secure service layer in Node.js that consumes a queue of lead data and triggers automated personalized emails via SendGrid.
steps.claude_code_command: claude terminal 'npm install @sendgrid/mail && setup email service module'

steps.title: Implementing AI-Powered Content Personalization
steps.description: Use Claude to dynamically rewrite email snippets based on the user's specific interest segment.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a utility function that uses the Claude API to rewrite email templates based on a 'user_segment' parameter.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'create ai-service.js to handle dynamic email content generation'

steps.title: Building the Automation Trigger Engine
steps.description: Configure the logic that monitors new signups and triggers the workflow.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create an event-driven controller that listens for new lead entries and executes the personalization workflow.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'implement event emitter for lead-signup sequence'

steps.title: Deploying and Monitoring
steps.description: Deploy your infrastructure and set up basic telemetry to track conversion rates.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a monitoring dashboard configuration to track email send success rates and user engagement metrics.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'deploy to production and verify webhook health checks'

pro_tips: Always build your database schema before writing a single line of application logic; it prevents technical debt.
Use Claude Code to write your unit tests simultaneously with your features to ensure 80% coverage.
Avoid over-engineering the UI; focus on the backend automation logic first to prove the business value.
Implement environment variables for all third-party API keys to keep your codebase secure and portable.
Schedule your automation tasks using cron jobs rather than long-running loops for better system reliability.
content.next_steps: Once your automation is live, perform a load test to ensure your system can handle 100+ concurrent signups, then integrate a CRM like Hubspot for deeper analytics.
content.conversion_block: You now possess the technical framework to automate marketing at scale—a skill that separates top-tier developers from the rest. Stop waiting for permission to build. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
